summary: CRM UI Enhancements Testing Complete - All new features verified working. Tested inline 'Add Field' button in Create Lead dialog, Lead Detail dialog with 4 tabs (Overview, Remarks, Follow-up, Activity), remark creation, follow-up scheduling, summary saving, and stage changes from detail view.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement recommended

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: DialogContent components should include DialogDescription for accessibility compliance

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All CRM enhancement features working correctly

seed_data_creation: Added test remark and follow-up to Anita Sharma lead during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: CRM UI enhancements fully tested. New features: 1) Inline 'Add Field' button in Create Lead dialog (Notion-style) - allows creating custom fields on the fly. 2) Lead Detail dialog with tabbed interface - Overview (contact info, summary, stage change), Remarks (add/view notes), Follow-up (schedule follow-ups), Activity (timeline of stage changes). All CRUD operations verified working via UI.

crm_presales_login.details: Pre-Sales user login via quick access button works

kanban_board.details: Kanban board loads with stages: New Lead, Contacted, Proposal, Follow-up, Appointment Booked

add_lead_dialog.details: Add Lead dialog opens with form fields and inline 'Add Field' button visible

add_field_dialog.details: Add Custom Field dialog opens with Field Name, Display Label, and Field Type (Text default)

lead_detail_dialog.details: Clicking lead card opens detailed view with 4 tabs

lead_detail_overview_tab.details: Shows Contact Information, Lead Summary textarea with Save Summary button, Move to Stage buttons

lead_detail_remarks_tab.details: Shows Add Remark textarea with send button, displays existing remarks with user name and timestamp

lead_detail_followup_tab.details: Shows Schedule Follow-up form (datetime input, note textarea, Schedule button), displays scheduled follow-ups with Pending/Completed status

lead_detail_activity_tab.details: Shows Activity Timeline with stage changes (Moved to X), Lead created entry, timestamps

add_remark.details: Remark added successfully, toast notification shown, remark displayed in list

schedule_followup.details: Follow-up scheduled successfully, toast notification shown, follow-up displayed in list with Pending status

save_summary.details: Summary saved successfully, toast notification 'Summary saved' shown

stage_change_from_detail.details: Stage changed from detail view, toast 'Lead stage updated' shown, lead moved in Kanban board

lead_card_badges.details: Lead cards show badges for remarks count and follow-up indicator

api_endpoints_verified.GET /api/crm/leads/{lead_id}: Lead detail with remarks and follow-ups
api_endpoints_verified.PATCH /api/crm/leads/{lead_id}/stage: Change lead stage from detail view
